dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 20-day breakout highs which map to Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper). Entry on pullback interpreted as price crossing above after consolidation. Stop loss calculated as 0.75 ATR above entry (stop_loss_pct field). Take profit based on retracement distance to lower band (dc_lower used as exit target). Hold period max of 7 bars as specified. Donchian Channel is standard 20-period equivalent to 20-day high/low range. Price position pullback to 0.3 percentile aligns with dc_lower crossover logic.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 20-day breakout highs which map to Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper). Entry on pullback interpreted as price crossing above after consolidation. Stop loss calculated as 0.75 ATR above entry (stop_loss_pct field). Take profit based on retracement distance to lower band (dc_lower used as exit target). Hold period max of 7 bars as specified. Donchian Channel is standard 20-period equivalent to 20-day high/low range. Price position pullback to 0.3 percentile aligns with dc_lower crossover logic.

source_rule_text: A trader should use short-term setups based on recent price breakouts to identify lower-risk entry conditions by compressing the timeframe of analysis.
